audit_items.proof_trace: Property holds. All P2P data column sidecars undergo comprehensive validation before acceptance via three entry points: (1) Gossip enforces 12 requirements including cryptographic proofs, consensus checks, and structural validation (lines 81-166); (2) RPC by-root/by-range enforce ValidFields, InclusionProven, and KzgProofVerified (data_column_sidecars.go:986); (3) SSZ decoding enforces size limits and structural validity (ssz.go:82-91). The type system prevents unverified RODataColumns from being used via VerifiedRODataColumn wrapper.
